creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 243765
graphics-vhs-0.6.0.patch

Description:

* Update to 0.6.0
* Change OPTIONS_SINGLE to OPTIONS_RADIO
* Remove OPTIONS_DEFAULT
* Add pkg-post-install

ChangeLog: https://github.com/charmbracelet/vhs/releases/tag/v0.6.0

* Apple Symbols font fallback for braille characters
* Alt + Shift modifiers
* Cursor Blink settings

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13.2-RELEASE, amd64, CHROMIUM UNGOOGLED_CHROMIUM tested)

Notes:

* Since VHS needs chromium or ungoogled-chromium to work properly, but a lot of time and effort is spent building them, I simply make them optional and add a pkg-post-install script to indicate that VHS needs one of them.
